candidates.thesis: Leading player in cybersecurity with strong secular growth tailwinds. Benefiting from increasing corporate and government spending on cybersecurity solutions. Recent pullback provides a favorable entry point.
CrowdStrike is a high-growth cybersecurity company benefiting from the secular trend toward cloud-based security solutions. Positioned well for long-term growth with strong fundamentals.

Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing is the global leader in advanced semiconductor manufacturing, benefiting from AI and compute infrastructure demand. Trading near its SMA50 provides a reasonable entry point.

ASML is the dominant supplier of lithography equipment for semiconductor manufacturing, including EUV technology critical for advanced chips. Long-term tailwinds from AI and compute infrastructure demand.
GEV is a clean energy infrastructure company focused on small modular reactors and next-gen energy solutions. Positioned to benefit from global energy transition trends.
